expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: Google Sheets dashboard export coverage distinguishes supported formats, entry points, and output expectations
expectations.evidence: The output states the required distinctions (formats/entry points/output expectations) but does not actually cover them with concrete content; it explicitly says evidence is missing: "does not include any Phase 5b required artifacts ... nor product spec content that enumerates formats/entry points/output." Therefore the case focus is not covered in the produced plan/checkpoint content.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The output is explicitly framed as phase5b checkpoint enforcement and references phase5b rubric/artifacts throughout: "# ... Phase 5b Checkpoint Enforcement" and "Primary phase under test: phase5b" plus detailed phase5b artifact expectations (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b).
